ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the participant */,
  "myopic" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the participant is myopic */,
  "parental_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parental data */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "address" TEXT /* Participant's address */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Participant's contact number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Participant's email */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant enrolled in the study */,
  "withdrawal_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant withdrew from the study (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_parental_id FOREIGN KEY ("parental_id") REFERENCES parental_data ("parental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "myopia_data" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "spheq" REAL /* Spherical equivalent (SPHEQ) */,
  "al" REAL /* Axial length (AL) */,
  "acd" REAL /* Anterior chamber depth (ACD) */,
  "lt" REAL /* Lens thickness (LT) */,
  "vcd" REAL /* Vitreous chamber depth (VCD) */,
  "diopterhr" REAL /* Diopter hours (DIOPTERHR) */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the measurement */,
  "measurement_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_myopia_data_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_data" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "sport_hr" INTEGER /* Hours spent on sports activities */,
  "read_hr" INTEGER /* Hours spent reading */,
  "comp_hr" INTEGER /* Hours spent on computer use */,
  "study_hr" INTEGER /* Hours spent studying */,
  "tv_hr" INTEGER /* Hours spent watching TV */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity data was recorded */,
  "activity_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the activity data */,
  "screen_distance" REAL /* Average distance from the screen during screen time activities */,
  "lighting_conditions" TEXT /* Lighting conditions during activities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_data_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parental_data" (
  "parental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parental data record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "mother_myopic" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the mother is myopic */,
  "father_myopic" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the father is myopic */,
  "parental_relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the parent to the participant */,
  "parental_age" INTEGER /* Age of the parent */,
  "parental_education" TEXT /* Education level of the parent */,
  "parental_occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the parent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parental_data_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_types" (
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity (e.g., Sport, Read, Comp, Study, TV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "myopia_progression" (
  "progression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progression record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the measurement */,
  "spheq_change" REAL /* Change in SPHEQ */,
  "al_change" REAL /* Change in AL */,
  "acd_change" REAL /* Change in ACD */,
  "lt_change" REAL /* Change in LT */,
  "vcd_change" REAL /* Change in VCD */,
  "progression_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the progression data */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the progression measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_myopia_progression_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., lead, associate, assistant) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the researcher is affiliated */,
  "researcher_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study session */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher conducting the session */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant involved in the session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the study session */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes taken during the study session */,
  "session_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the study session */,
  "session_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the study session */,
  "session_location" TEXT /* Location where the study session was conducted */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the study session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_sessions_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_sessions_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher accessing the data */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant whose data is accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the school */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the school */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal */,
  "principal_email" TEXT /* Email address of the principal */,
  "principal_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the principal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)
